title: elaeocarpus lingualis
intro: Elaeocarpus lingualis is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae, commonly known as a type of blueberry ash. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus lingualis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
